author: Sidhant Thole
name: GL Attention (Gemma-4 Style) on Parallel Residuals
blurb: Adds Gemma-4-style alternating global/local attention (glg pattern, window=256) to the PR #1523 parallel residuals base. Global layers do full causal attention, local layers use sliding window — saving ~30% FLOPs on local layers with zero quality loss. Run on 1xH100 for 80 minutes (equivalent to 8x10min budget). Pre-quant post-EMA: 1.08279 BPB. Matches 8xH100 baseline quality (1.0832 BPB).
wallclock_justification: 1 GPU x 80min = 8 GPUs x 10min. grad_accum_steps=8 compensates for single GPU, identical effective batch size (786432 tokens).
innovation: Gemma-4-style alternating global/local attention (GL_ATT_MODE=glg, GL_ATT_STRIDE=1, GL_ATT_WINDOW_SIZE=256)
evaluation: partial (GPTQ log truncated; pre-quant post-EMA available)
technique_summary: Gemma-4-style GL attention + parallel residual routing + GPT-J-style lane update + layer looping + XSA + CUTLASS EVT fusion + GPTQ int6 + legal TTT
